ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sea_ice_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "sea_of_okhotsk" REAL /* Sea ice extent in the Sea of Okhotsk (in million square kilometers) */,
  "bering_sea" REAL /* Sea ice extent in the Bering Sea (in million square kilometers) */,
  "hudson_bay" REAL /* Sea ice extent in the Hudson Bay (in million square kilometers) */,
  "baffin_bay" REAL /* Sea ice extent in the Baffin Bay (in million square kilometers) */,
  "east_greenland_sea" REAL /* Sea ice extent in the East Greenland Sea (in million square kilometers) */,
  "barents_sea" REAL /* Sea ice extent in the Barents Sea (in million square kilometers) */,
  "kara_sea" REAL /* Sea ice extent in the Kara Sea (in million square kilometers) */,
  "laptev_sea" REAL /* Sea ice extent in the Laptev Sea (in million square kilometers) */,
  "east_siberian_sea" REAL /* Sea ice extent in the East Siberian Sea (in million square kilometers) */,
  "chukchi_sea" REAL /* Sea ice extent in the Chukchi Sea (in million square kilometers) */,
  "beaufort_sea" REAL /* Sea ice extent in the Beaufort Sea (in million square kilometers) */,
  "canadian_archipelago" REAL /* Sea ice extent in the Canadian Archipelago (in million square kilometers) */,
  "central_arctic" REAL /* Sea ice extent in the Central Arctic (in million square kilometers) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the measurement data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was last updated */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source providing the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sea_ice_measurements_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arctic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Arctic region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the Arctic region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Arctic region */,
  "geo_boundary" TEXT /* Geographic boundary of the Arctic region (in WKT format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., satellite, in-situ measurements) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being validated */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the measurement (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "validation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the validation process */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the validation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES sea_ice_measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_validated_by FOREIGN KEY ("validated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES sea_ice_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the measurement */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the changes were made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES sea_ice_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being cited */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation information */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date the citation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_citations_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES sea_ice_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutional_affiliations" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_institutions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "institution_id")
)
